title: National patterns of brachytherapy boost use for intermediate- and high-risk prostate cancer: Bridging the gap between evidence and practice.
abstract: Brachytherapy boost in combination with external beam radiation therapy (EBRT-BT) improves biochemical progression-free survival in patients with intermediate- and high-risk prostate cancer. However, its adoption in routine clinical practice remains uncertain. We aimed to evaluate national trends and factors associated with the use of EBRT-BT following the publication of the ASCENDE-RT trial.
